abstract.text: Make your email app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common email actions.

inlineContent.text: The
domain defines app schemas that provide a
structured representation for common email actions and content.
Apply schemas in the
domain to make your app’s email functionality available to Apple Intelligence and Siri.
Each schema defines the requirements for intents, parameters, and results so people get a consistent experience across email apps.
For example, a person can compose an email on different apps that support the
schema with the same phrases.
The following table maps example phrases that apply to each schema.
Your app needs to support all of these schemas when it supports any one of them.
Mail intent schemas
Example phrases
“Compose a mail.” or “Write an email to example@example.com about photos from team dinner.”
“Add example@example.com to recipients.” or “Set subject to coffee session.”
“Draft this email for later.” or “Save it.”
“Open the draft email to John and James.”
“Delete this draft.” or “Trash my most recent draft.”
“Send this email.” or “Send this email tomorrow at 9 PM.”
“Open the email about team offsite instructions.”
“Reply to an email.” or “Reply to mail thread with my manager.”
“Forward an email.” or “Forward the email about the baseball schedule to John Appleseed.”
“Mark this email as read.” or “Flag this email.”
“Archive book club emails.” or “Archive emails from Nancy.”
“Delete emails from Julian.” or “Trash all mail messages from Example Store.”
At build time, Xcode validates whether your app implements all the schemas in the group.
Xcode generates a template implementation when you type
and select a schema from the suggestions list.
For more information about making your app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri, see

abstract.text: An intent schema that opens an email composer to forward an email.
Make your note-taking app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common note actions.
Make your app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for in-app search and content access.
An intent schema that archives one or more email messages.
An intent schema that makes updates to an email draft.
Make your audio app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common audio playback actions.
Integrate your app with Apple Intelligence and bring it to Siri AI.
An entity schema for a draft.
An entity schema for an account.
Make content and actions discoverable by Apple Intelligence and support system experiences like Siri, Spotlight, Shortcuts, and widgets.
Identifies entity schemas in the mail domain.
Identifies intent schemas in the mail domain.
Make your photo and video app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common photo and video actions.
Make your messaging app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common messaging actions.
Make your phone app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for calling actions.
An entity schema for a message.
An intent schema that makes updates to one or more existing email messages by modifying the status, flags, and location.
An intent schema that opens an email message.
An intent schema that saves an email draft.
An intent schema that sends an email draft or schedules it to be sent later.

Make your clock app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common alarm and timer actions.

An intent schema that opens an email draft.

An entity schema for a thread.
An intent schema that opens an email composer to reply to an email.
Declare support for well-known actions and content by applying system-defined schemas to
your app intents, app entities, and app enumerations.
Make your navigation app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common navigation actions.
An entity schema for a mailbox.
An intent schema that deletes one or more email drafts.
An intent schema that deletes one or more email messages.
An intent schema that opens an email composer to draft an email.
